🔥
Connect for Live Scoring
Set up Firebase so you and your friend can see each other's scores in real-time on any device, anywhere. Free — takes 3 minutes.
1Go to console.firebase.google.com
2Click Add project → name it anything → continue
3Click Web </> to add a web app → register app
4Copy the databaseURL value (looks like https://xxx-default-rtdb.firebaseio.com)
5Go to Build → Realtime Database → Create → choose test mode
💡 Enable Google Sign-In: In Firebase Console → Authentication → Sign-in method → Google → Enable
Could not connect. Check your URL and make sure Realtime Database is enabled in test mode.
— or —
